title: ZlideOn Zipper Repair Kit - Black, (L/5) - Pull Replacement for Sliders, Plastic Zippers, Zipper Fixer Repair Kit Works with Backpacks, Luggage, Gear Bags, Tents, and Jackets and More
features: How to Choose the Right Zipper Replacement: select the correct model for your zipper type (metal, plastic, narrow, waterproof), then check if you have a number stamped on the back of your broken zipper slider—this indicates the size. To be 100% certain, measure the width and height of the slider to confirm. Use this information to compare against the ZlideOn size chart (found in the product images or description).
Replace Zipper Quick & Easy - You don't have to buy a new jacket or a complicated zipper repair kit, ZlideOn has your back. It takes less than half a minute, and it’s super easy. Made in Europe.
Keep Your Favorite Clothes & Bags - You don't need to throw away your favorite clothes because of a broken zipper. With ZlideOn's replacement zipper, you can repair your clothes in 30s.
Fits All Sorts of Zippers - If you need to fix a zipper, you can always use ZlideOn. Our different sizes fit jackets, pockets, bags, boots, dresses, skirts, and even wet suits!
Save Money and The Environment - By using ZlideOn's zipper slider replacement, you'll not only save money, but you'll also save the environment. Be nice to both your wallet and our climate.
